name: Chromatic Orb
description: You hurl a 4-inch-diameter sphere of energy at a creature within range. Choose Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, Poison, or Thunder for the damage type, then make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 3d8 damage of the chosen type. If you roll the same number on two of the dice, the orb leaps to a creature of your choice within 30 feet that you can see (you make a new attack roll against the new target).
scaling: The damage increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 1.
